Package com.myscript.iink

package com.myscript.iink
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.myscript.iink.graphics
     
    com.myscript.iink.text
     
  • Class
    Description
    ChangesetOperation
    Represents a changeset operation.
    ChangesetOperationType
    Changeset operation types.
    Configuration
    Represents the configuration values of the iink runtime environment.
    ContentBlock
    Represents a block of content.
    ContentPackage
    A package stores the user content as a sorted collection of parts.
    ContentPart
    A part stores one content item.
    ContentSelection
    Represents a selection of content.
    ContentSelectionMode
    Predefined Content Selection modes.
    ConversionState
    Describes the state of the content for a given block.
    Editor
    The Editor is the entry point to modify a part.
    EditorError
    Represents an Editor error code.
    Engine
    Represents the iink runtime environment.
    GestureAction
    Represents the action to be performed upon gesture detection.
    HandwritingGenerator
    Represents a handwriting generator that provides a way to generate handwritten content from source parameters (label, writing profile and formatting).
    HandwritingGeneratorError
    Error code used in IHandwritingGeneratorListener::onError
    HandwritingProfile
    Represents a handwriting profile used to generate content with a handwriting generator.
    HandwritingProfileBuilder
    A builder for handwriting profiles.
    HandwritingResult
    Represents a handwritten content generated by a handwriting generator.
    HistoryManager
    A HistoryManager allows managing changesets for undo/redo.
    IConfigurationListener
    The listener interface for receiving configuration change events.
    IEditorListener
    The listener interface for receiving editor events.
    IGestureHandler
    The listener interface for handling gesture events.
    IHandwritingGeneratorListener
    The listener interface for receiving handwriting generator events.
    IImagePainter
    The ImagePainter converts rendering data into images in view for example for integration into docx exports.
    IndentationLevels
    Represents a selection indentation levels.
    IOffscreenEditorListener
    The listener interface for receiving offscreen editor events.
    IOffscreenGestureHandler
    The listener interface for handling offscreen gesture events.
    IRecognizerListener
    The listener interface for receiving recognizer events.
    IRendererListener
    The listener interface for receiving renderer events.
    IRenderTarget
    Represents a render target for the iink renderer.
    IRenderTarget.LayerType
    Represents the type of a layer
    ItemIdCombinationModifier
    Describes the combination modifiers.
    ItemIdHelper
    An ItemIdHelper allows working with item ids (example: strokes, glyphs, primitives, objects).
    MathDiagnostic
    Error code returned by MathSolverController::getDiagnostic.
    MathEvaluationVariables
    Represents a pair of input/output math variables used for evaluation.
    MathExternalExpression
    The MathExternalExpression allows to manage an external math expression.
    MathSolverController
    A MathSolverController allows to configure and run math operations on an editor.
    MathVariableDefinition
    Represents a math variable definition.
    MathVariableDefinitionInfo
    Represents a math variable definition info.
    MathVariableDefinitions
    Represents a math variable definitions.
    MathVariableInfo
    Represents a math variable information, relative to a block or global.
    MathVariableSourceType
    Enumerates the possible sources from which a variable can be defined.
    MimeType
    Represents a MIME type.
    NativeLibrary
    Represents the iink native library.
    NativeObjectHandle<T extends AutoCloseable>
    Allows requesting ownership of a native object.
    OffscreenEditor
    The OffscreenEditor is a service allowing offscreen interactivity.
    OffscreenGestureAction
    Represents the action to be performed upon offscreen gesture detection.
    PackageOpenOption
    Describes the different options given when opening a package.
    ParameterSet
    Represents a set of iink parameters.
    PlaceholderController
    A PlaceholderController allows to add and update placeholders in an editor.
    PlaceholderController.PlaceholderInteractivityOptions
    Defines how a placeholder shall behave regarding user interactions.
    PointerEvent
    Represents a pointer event.
    PointerEventType
    Describes the types of pointer event that can be provided to the editor.
    PointerTool
    Describes the tools that the pointer types can be associated with.
    PointerType
    Describes the types of pointer that can be used for input.
    RecognitionAssetsBuilder
    The RecognitionAssetsBuilder implements the tools to generate and save recognition assets.
    Recognizer
    The Recognizer runs background handwriting recognition on ink.
    RecognizerError
    Represents a Recognizer error code.
    Renderer
    The Renderer implements content rendering of parts.
    ShapeOnHoldAction
    Action type associated with a shape on hold event.
    TextFormat
    Predefined Text Box formats.
    ToolController
    The ToolController manages pointer tools configuration.
    TransformError
    Error code returned by Editor getTransformStatus
